mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_resource (name, type, description, file_url, file_size, download_count, uploader_id, uploader_name, uploader_role, content, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{description}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{downloadCount}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderName}, #{uploaderRole}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_resource SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_size = #{fileSize}, uploader_name = #{uploaderName}, uploader_role = #{uploaderRole}, content = #{content}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_resource ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resource WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resource WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resource WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resource WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND type = #{type} AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_resource WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_resource WHERE type = #{type}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_resource WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_resource WHERE type = #{type} AND status = #{status}
